title: Shiyloh #7887
definition:
Shiloh = "place of rest"

 1) a city in Ephraim and temporary home of the Ark of the Covenant
    and the Tabernacle, the place where Samuel grew up
nasbUsage:

    and the Tabernacle, the place where Samuel grew up
